templates.title: General protocol skeleton
templates.description: Blank lab-protocol scaffold: materials, steps, notes, and safety sections ready to fill in.

templates.title: Q5 high-fidelity PCR setup
templates.description: 25 uL Q5 reaction recipe plus a 3-step cycling program with a 60 C anneal.

templates.title: Colony PCR screen
templates.description: Taq-based 20 uL colony-screen reaction with an extended initial denaturation to lyse cells.

templates.title: Reverse-phase peptide LC gradient
templates.description: C18 5-to-95% acetonitrile gradient with 0.1% formic acid for LC-MS peptide separation.

templates.title: 96-well dose-response layout
templates.description: Pre-labeled 96-well plate: column 1 blanks, column 2 vehicle controls, columns 3-12 samples.

templates.title: HEK293 passaging schedule
templates.description: Adherent HEK293 maintenance in DMEM + 10% FBS with a 1:6 split every 3 days.

templates.title: Western blot (SDS-PAGE + transfer)
templates.description: SDS-PAGE separation, wet transfer, blocking, and ECL detection steps as editable markdown.

templates.title: TaqMan Fast Advanced qPCR
templates.description: Applied Biosystems probe-based (TaqMan) fast 20 uL qPCR: optional UNG hold, fast polymerase activation, 40 cycles, no melt curve.

templates.title: PowerUp SYBR Green qPCR
templates.description: Applied Biosystems SYBR Green 20 uL qPCR: UDG + Dual-Lock activation, standard 2-step cycling, with a melt-curve (dissociation) stage.

templates.title: SsoAdvanced Universal SYBR Green qPCR
templates.description: Bio-Rad SYBR Green 20 uL qPCR: fast Sso7d polymerase activation, 40 cycles, with a 65-95 C melt curve.

templates.title: SsoAdvanced Universal Probes qPCR
templates.description: Bio-Rad probe-based (hydrolysis probe) 20 uL qPCR: fast Sso7d activation, 40 cycles, no melt curve.

templates.title: iTaq Universal SYBR Green qPCR
templates.description: Bio-Rad SYBR Green 20 uL qPCR with iTaq hot-start polymerase: activation, 40 cycles, and a 65-95 C melt curve.

templates.title: SsoFast EvaGreen qPCR
templates.description: Bio-Rad EvaGreen dye fast 20 uL qPCR: 30 sec Sso7d activation, ultrafast 1-5 sec cycling, 65-95 C melt curve.

templates.title: Luna Universal qPCR (NEB)
templates.description: New England Biolabs dye-based 20 uL qPCR (M3003): 95 C activation, 40-45 cycles, with a 60-95 C melt curve.

templates.title: Luna Universal Probe qPCR (NEB)
templates.description: New England Biolabs probe-based 20 uL qPCR (M3004): 95 C activation, 40-45 cycles, no melt curve.

templates.title: LightCycler 480 SYBR Green I qPCR
templates.description: Roche SYBR Green I 20 uL qPCR: 95 C pre-incubation, 45 cycles, full melt-curve and cooling program.

templates.title: LightCycler 480 Probes qPCR
templates.description: Roche probe-based 20 uL qPCR: 95 C pre-incubation, 45 cycles, short 72 C extension, no melt curve.

templates.title: QuantiNova SYBR Green qPCR
templates.description: QIAGEN SYBR Green fast 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C activation, ultrafast 2-step cycling, melt-curve analysis.

templates.title: QuantiNova Probe qPCR
templates.description: QIAGEN probe-based fast 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C activation, ultrafast 2-step cycling, no melt curve.

templates.title: Rotor-Gene SYBR Green qPCR
templates.description: QIAGEN SYBR Green 25 uL qPCR for the Rotor-Gene Q: 5 min 95 C activation, fast 2-step cycling, 60-95 C melt curve.

templates.title: GoTaq qPCR (Promega)
templates.description: Promega BRYT Green dye 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C hot-start activation, 40 cycles, melt-curve analysis.

templates.title: GoTaq Probe qPCR (Promega)
templates.description: Promega probe-based 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C hot-start activation, 40 cycles, no melt curve.

templates.title: TB Green Premix Ex Taq II qPCR
templates.description: Takara TB Green (SYBR-type) 25 uL qPCR (RR820): 30 sec 95 C hot-start, fast 2-step cycling, dissociation/melt curve.

templates.title: Takara Premix Ex Taq Probe qPCR
templates.description: Takara probe-based 25 uL qPCR (RR390): 30 sec 95 C hot-start, fast 2-step cycling, no melt curve.

templates.title: Gibson Assembly Master Mix
templates.description: NEB Gibson Assembly Master Mix (#E2611): kit components plus the 20 uL 50 C isothermal reaction for joining 2-6 overlapping fragments.

templates.title: NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly
templates.description: NEB NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (#E2621): kit components plus the 20 uL isothermal assembly reaction for joining 2-6 overlapping fragments.

templates.title: QIAprep Spin Miniprep (plasmid DNA)
templates.description: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit (#27104): kit buffers and spin columns plus the microcentrifuge protocol for purifying plasmid DNA from E. coli.

templates.title: Qubit dsDNA HS assay
templates.description: Thermo Fisher Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit (#Q32851): kit components plus the fluorometric working-solution protocol for quantifying double-stranded DNA.

templates.title: Bio-Rad iProof High-Fidelity PCR
templates.description: Bio-Rad iProof High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a 98 C denaturation and 72 C extension.

templates.title: Bio-Rad iTaq PCR
templates.description: Bio-Rad iTaq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL antibody hot-start reaction requiring a 95 C / 3 min activation.

templates.title: KAPA HiFi HotStart PCR
templates.description: Roche KAPA HiFi HotStart ReadyMix (2X): 25 uL high-fidelity reaction with a 98 C cycle denaturation and 60-75 C anneal.

templates.title: KAPA Taq PCR
templates.description: Roche KAPA Taq DNA Polymerase: 25 uL standard Taq reaction with a Tm-5 anneal and 1 min/kb extension.

templates.title: KAPA2G Fast PCR
templates.description: Roche KAPA2G Fast ReadyMix (2X): 25 uL fast standard-Taq reaction, optimized for amplicons under 1 kb.

templates.title: KAPA2G Robust PCR
templates.description: Roche KAPA2G Robust DNA Polymerase: 25 uL fast, inhibitor-tolerant Taq reaction with a 95 C / 15 sec denaturation.

templates.title: NEB OneTaq 2X Master Mix PCR
templates.description: New England Biolabs OneTaq 2X Master Mix with Standard Buffer (M0482): 50 uL robust reaction with a 94 C denaturation and 68 C extension.

templates.title: NEB OneTaq PCR
templates.description: New England Biolabs OneTaq DNA Polymerase (M0480): 50 uL robust standard reaction with a 94 C denaturation and 68 C extension.

templates.title: NEB Phusion High-Fidelity PCR
templates.description: New England Biolabs Phusion High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase (M0530): 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with 5X HF buffer and a 72 C extension.

templates.title: NEB Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix PCR
templates.description: New England Biolabs Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix (M0492): 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a 98 C denaturation and 72 C extension.

templates.title: NEB Taq DNA Polymerase PCR
templates.description: New England Biolabs Taq DNA Polymerase with Standard Taq Buffer (M0273): 50 uL standard reaction with a 95 C denaturation.

templates.title: Promega GoTaq G2 Flexi PCR
templates.description: Promega GoTaq G2 Flexi DNA Polymerase: 50 uL standard reaction with a separately added, tunable MgCl2.

templates.title: Promega GoTaq Green Master Mix PCR
templates.description: Promega GoTaq Green Master Mix (2X): 50 uL standard reaction, direct-to-gel, with a 95 C denaturation.

templates.title: Promega Pfu High-Fidelity PCR
templates.description: Promega Pfu DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a slow ~2 min/kb extension.

templates.title: QIAGEN HotStarTaq Plus Master Mix PCR
templates.description: QIAGEN HotStarTaq Plus Master Mix (2X): 50 uL hot-start reaction with a shorter 95 C / 5 min activation.

templates.title: QIAGEN HotStarTaq PCR
templates.description: QIAGEN HotStarTaq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL hot-start reaction requiring a 95 C / 15 min activation.

templates.title: QIAGEN Taq PCR
templates.description: QIAGEN Taq DNA Polymerase (Taq PCR Core Kit): 50 uL standard reaction with a 94 C denaturation.

templates.title: QIAGEN TopTaq PCR
templates.description: QIAGEN TopTaq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL standard reaction with a pre-optimized 60 C anneal and a 94 C denaturation.

templates.title: Takara Ex Taq PCR
templates.description: Takara Bio TaKaRa Ex Taq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-yield standard reaction (worked example shown for a 1 kb target).

templates.title: Takara LA Taq Long PCR
templates.description: Takara Bio TaKaRa LA Taq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL long-and-accurate 2-step reaction (worked example shown for a 17.5 kb target).

templates.title: Takara PrimeSTAR GXL PCR
templates.description: Takara Bio PrimeSTAR GXL DNA Polymerase: 50 uL robust high-fidelity reaction with a 68 C extension, for long and difficult templates.

templates.title: Takara PrimeSTAR HS PCR
templates.description: Takara Bio PrimeSTAR HS DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction, no long initial denaturation, 72 C / 1 min per kb.

templates.title: Takara PrimeSTAR Max PCR
templates.description: Takara Bio PrimeSTAR Max DNA Polymerase 2X premix: 50 uL fast high-fidelity reaction at 5 sec/kb extension.

templates.title: Thermo DreamTaq Green Master Mix PCR
templates.description: Thermo Fisher DreamTaq Green PCR Master Mix (2X): 50 uL standard reaction, direct-to-gel, with a 95 C denaturation.

templates.title: Invitrogen Platinum II Taq Hot-Start PCR
templates.description: Thermo Fisher Platinum II Taq Hot-Start DNA Polymerase: 50 uL reaction with a universal 60 C anneal and fast 68 C extension.

templates.title: Invitrogen Platinum SuperFi II PCR
templates.description: Thermo Fisher Platinum SuperFi II DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a universal 60 C anneal and 72 C extension.

templates.title: Invitrogen Platinum Taq PCR
templates.description: Thermo Fisher Platinum Taq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL antibody hot-start reaction with a 94 C denaturation.

templates.title: BCA protein standard curve (384-well)
templates.description: 384-well Thermo Pierce BCA layout: the 9-point BSA standard set (2000-0 ug/mL, vials A-I) in 6 replicates across the top rows, unknown protein samples below. Also works for Bradford.

templates.title: BCA protein standard curve (96-well)
templates.description: Thermo Pierce BCA microplate layout: the 9-point BSA standard set (2000-0 ug/mL, vials A-I) in triplicate across the top rows, unknown protein samples below. Also works for Bradford.

templates.title: IC50 dose-response (384-well)
templates.description: 384-well biochemical / enzyme-inhibition IC50 layout: background blank, vehicle (0% inhibition anchor), reference inhibitor (100% inhibition anchor), and a 20-point test-compound serial dilution for a 4-parameter curve fit.

templates.title: 8-point IC50 dose-response (96-well)
templates.description: Biochemical / enzyme-inhibition IC50 layout: background blank, vehicle (0% inhibition anchor), reference inhibitor (100% inhibition anchor), and an 8-point test-compound serial dilution for a 4-parameter curve fit.

templates.title: MTT / CellTiter cell-viability plate (384-well)
templates.description: 384-well cell-viability dose-response layout (MTT / MTS / CellTiter): no-cell blanks, untreated vehicle (100% viability), max-kill positive control (0% viability), and a 20-point treatment dose series.

templates.title: MTT / CellTiter cell-viability plate (96-well)
templates.description: Cell-viability dose-response layout (MTT / MTS / CellTiter): no-cell blanks, untreated vehicle (100% viability), max-kill positive control (0% viability), and an 8-point treatment dose series.

templates.title: Sandwich ELISA plate map (384-well)
templates.description: 384-well sandwich ELISA layout scaled from the R&D Systems DuoSet protocol: a 7-point standard curve in quadruplicate (columns 1-4), a zero standard, and the rest of the plate as samples in duplicate.

templates.title: Sandwich ELISA plate map (96-well)
templates.description: Sandwich ELISA layout per the R&D Systems DuoSet protocol: 7-point standard curve in duplicate (columns 1-2), samples in duplicate (columns 3-6), remaining wells as blanks.

templates.title: Agarose gel electrophoresis (DNA)
templates.description: Cast, load, run, and image a DNA agarose gel, with the Thermo Fisher agarose-vs-size table and Addgene bench steps.

templates.title: Glycerol stock preparation + storage
templates.description: Make and store a long-term bacterial glycerol stock at -80 C, following the Addgene protocol.

templates.title: Bacterial heat-shock transformation (NEB)
templates.description: Chemical heat-shock transformation of competent E. coli (42 C / 30 sec) per the NEB high-efficiency protocol, with an electroporation note.

templates.title: Restriction enzyme digest (single + double)
templates.description: Single and double restriction digests in 50 uL, with NEB unit and glycerol rules and Double Digest Finder buffer selection.

templates.title: SDS-PAGE protein gel + Coomassie stain
templates.description: Run an SDS-PAGE protein gel and Coomassie stain it, following Bio-Rad Mini-PROTEAN and Bio-Safe Coomassie protocols.

templates.title: Ligation with T4 DNA ligase (NEB)
templates.description: T4 DNA ligase reaction setup and incubation (sticky vs blunt) per the NEB M0202 protocol.

templates.title: Total RNA extraction (TRIzol)
templates.description: Single-step TRIzol total RNA extraction with chloroform phase separation, per the Thermo Fisher TRIzol Reagent user guide.

templates.title: Thermo Vanquish + Orbitrap Exploris: intact-protein LC-MS (MS setup)
templates.description: Thermo Orbitrap Exploris (BioPharma) Full MS intact-protein setup: HESI positive, R 30k, 1800 to 4000 m/z, in-source CID 110 V (Thermo app note 73885).

templates.title: Thermo Vanquish + Orbitrap Exploris: intact-protein LC-MS (LC gradient)
templates.description: Thermo reversed-phase gradient (25 to 80% B) for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass LC-MS on MAbPac RP at 80 C (Thermo app note 73885).

templates.title: Thermo UltiMate + Q Exactive: HILIC metabolomics LC-MS (LC gradient)
templates.description: Thermo HILIC metabolomics gradient (0 to 100% B) on Atlantis HILIC, 300 uL/min, 10 mM ammonium formate eluents (Thermo app note 656).

templates.title: Thermo UltiMate + Q Exactive: HILIC metabolomics LC-MS (MS setup)
templates.description: Thermo Q Exactive metabolomics setup: HESI positive, R 70k, 80 to 900 m/z, Full MS + ddMS2 (Thermo app note 656).

templates.title: Thermo EASY-nLC + Q Exactive: peptide LC-MS/MS (MS setup)
templates.description: Thermo Q Exactive data-dependent MS/MS for bottom-up peptides: nanoESI positive, MS1 R 60k / MS2 R 15k, 350 to 1200 m/z (Thermo app note 21550).

templates.title: Thermo EASY-nLC + Q Exactive: peptide LC-MS/MS (LC gradient)
templates.description: Thermo nano-LC reversed-phase gradient for bottom-up peptide LC-MS/MS on EASY-Spray PepMap C18 at 200 nL/min (Thermo app note 21550).

templates.title: A549 maintenance (ATCC)
templates.description: Adherent A549 (ATCC CCL-185) in F-12K + 10% FBS, split 1:3 to 1:8, feed 2 to 3x per week. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-185

templates.title: Cell counting + viability (trypan blue)
templates.description: Universal routine: 1:1 with 0.4% trypan blue, hemocytometer count, viability %. Source: Gibco Cell Culture Basics.

templates.title: CHO-K1 maintenance (ATCC)
templates.description: Adherent CHO-K1 (ATCC CCL-61) in F-12K + 10% FBS, split 1:4 to 1:8. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-61

templates.title: Cryopreservation / freezing
templates.description: Universal routine: complete medium + 5 to 10% DMSO, cool about 1 C/min, store in LN2 vapor. Sources: ATCC + Gibco.

templates.title: HEK293 maintenance (ATCC)
templates.description: Adherent HEK293 (ATCC CRL-1573) in EMEM + 10% FBS, split 1:6 to 1:10. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/crl-1573

templates.title: HeLa maintenance (ATCC)
templates.description: Adherent HeLa (ATCC CCL-2) in EMEM + 10% FBS, split 1:2 to 1:6. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-2

templates.title: Human iPSC maintenance (Gibco Essential 8)
templates.description: Feeder-free human iPSC/PSC in Gibco Essential 8 on vitronectin, daily feed, EDTA clump-passage every 4 to 5 days. Source: Gibco MAN0007035.

templates.title: Jurkat maintenance (ATCC)
templates.description: Suspension Jurkat E6-1 (ATCC TIB-152) in RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS; reseed 2 to 4 x 10^5 cells/mL, do not exceed 3 x 10^6. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/tib-152

templates.title: Mycoplasma testing
templates.description: Universal QC routine: antibiotic-free culture to 50 to 70%, then PCR / Hoechst / luminescence test. Source: ATCC kit 30-1012K.

templates.title: NIH/3T3 maintenance (ATCC)
templates.description: Adherent NIH/3T3 (ATCC CRL-1658) in DMEM + 10% CALF bovine serum (not FBS); subculture at 80% confluence or less. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/crl-1658

templates.title: Thaw cryopreserved cells
templates.description: Universal routine: rapid 37 C thaw, dilute into prewarmed medium, recover. Sources: Gibco + ATCC.

templates.title: Roche FastStart Taq PCR
templates.description: Roche FastStart Taq DNA Polymerase (5 U/uL): hot-start 50 uL reaction with a 95 C / 4 min activation step and 2 mM MgCl2 standard.

templates.title: Thermo EASY-nLC + Q Exactive: peptide LC-MS/MS (kit)
templates.description: Paired nano-LC gradient and Q Exactive MS/MS setup for bottom-up peptide LC-MS/MS (Thermo app note 21550). Instantiates both leaf methods together.

templates.title: Thermo UltiMate + Q Exactive: HILIC metabolomics LC-MS (kit)
templates.description: Paired HILIC gradient and Q Exactive MS setup for small-molecule metabolomics LC-MS (Thermo app note 656). Instantiates both leaf methods together.

templates.title: Thermo Vanquish + Orbitrap Exploris: intact-protein LC-MS (kit)
templates.description: Paired reversed-phase gradient and Orbitrap Exploris MS setup for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass LC-MS (Thermo app note 73885). Instantiates both leaf methods together.
